title: The 30-Day Window
subtitle: Why every founder gets the same letter from the IRS — and why most ignore it until it costs them seven figures

linkedin_article.action_required: manually paste into LinkedIn Article composer and use built-in scheduler

email.action_required: skip if no email list yet wired (per spec section 2.4)

notes: Source-material footer (EINs, USPS tracking numbers) stripped from publish versions — internal-only.

No LinkedIn API tool available in this environment — scheduling must be done manually in LinkedIn composer.
Apostrophes normalized to ASCII for paste-safety.
